description: Address review issues in SpotifyMiniPlayer: pointer cancel handling, deferred iframe, keyboard accessibility, stale buttonPos fix
steps: 1. Add onPointerCancel/onLostPointerCapture handlers to both the button and window drag surfaces to reset drag state when pointer is cancelled.
2. Defer iframe rendering until first expand using a hasEverExpanded ref.
3. Add keyboard accessibility (Enter/Space onKeyDown) to toggle the player open.
4. Fix stale buttonPos in pointer-up by using a ref for position tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Pointer cancel events reset drag state on both button and window
Iframe is not rendered until the user first opens the player
Keyboard users can activate the music button with Enter or Space
Button position is persisted accurately using a ref instead of stale closure state
pnpm lint and pnpm build both pass
